Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar May-31-2011 Continued To Jul-19-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Roger Gross made a special appearance for and with Counsel Ralph Petersen.

The Court suggested Counsel check to see if funds were escheated to the state of California or Nevada, to see if there is anyway to determine who Mr. Walker's Heirs are and file a report with the Court. Mr. Gross agreed to do so. The Motion to Be Relieved As Counsel and status of close of the Estate were continued to July 19, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-31-2011 Continued To Jul-19-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-03-2011 Continued To May-31-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-01-2011 Continued To May-03-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Roger Gross specially appearing for Ralph Petersen for Vincent Noble.

Mr. Gross addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes with regard to the dividends received, status of the proceeds and stated that they do not know where the bank accounts are. The Court stated that Mr. Petersen needs to move to close the estate and investigate the bank account. The matter was continued to May 3, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Clauzel.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-10-2002 Granted Per Written Order
